name: Silverwake
personality: Silverwake's × cross-eyes and halo belong to a duck who will pull up the architecture diagram from memory and explain, gently but inexorably, why your approach has five failure modes. Unpredictability and creative entropy are handled by slowly backing away from the keyboard.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
